name: Malice, Lady of Lament
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>悪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>嬢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マリス
desc: (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 2 monsters, then target 1 of your Normal Traps that is banished or in your GY; Set that target, but place it on the bottom of the Deck when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Malice, Lady of Lament" once per turn.
mnst_eff: (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 2 monsters, then target 1 of your Normal Traps that is banished or in your GY; Set that target, but place it on the bottom of the Deck when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Malice, Lady of Lament" once per turn.
eff: (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 2 monsters, then target 1 of your Normal Traps that is banished or in your GY; Set that target, but place it on the bottom of the Deck when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Malice, Lady of Lament" once per turn.

action: Returns to the Deck other cards when they leave the field
